节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Get running form info by form id belonging to the current bundle.
注释信息: @param { string } formId - Indicates the form ID.
@throws { BusinessError } 16500100 - Failed to obtain the configuration information.
@throws { BusinessError } 16501000 - An internal functional error occurred.
@throws { BusinessError } 16501001 - The ID of the form to be operated does not exist.
@throws { BusinessError } 16501003 - The form cannot be operated by the current application.

error_codes.description: Failed to obtain the configuration information.
The ID of the form to be operated does not exist.
The form cannot be operated by the current application.
